promoted_facts.fact: Gross Rooms Revenue definition includes loyalty redemptions, mandatory guest fees, late cancellation fees, no-show revenue; excludes Gross Receipts Tax
promoted_facts.source: Reader Report Pass B / Item 6 Note 1, FA §1.0 definitions

promoted_facts.fact: Hilton Advance Program: 1.35% of eligible Digital Direct Revenue, not to exceed $30 per stay. Digital Direct Revenue = all GRR from bookings through Hilton websites and mobile apps.
promoted_facts.source: Reader Report Pass B / Item 6 table

promoted_facts.fact: FRCM (Fixed Renovation Cycle Management) program may require periodic renovations. No limit on frequency or cost. Franchisee responsible for all costs.
Franchisor entity guarantees certain Hilton debt obligations maturing 2025-2033. All assets and franchise contracts pledged as collateral.
Graduate brand franchise contracts acquired May 2024 for ~$85M, accounted as asset acquisition with 15-year useful life.
Entity is disregarded for US income tax purposes. All taxable income included in Hilton's computation. Foreign tax only on certain US territory franchise fees.
Operator agreement with Hilton affiliate entitles affiliate to reasonable fee but no compensation was provided 2022-2024.
Note 9 subsequent events evaluation date stated as 'March 18, 2024' — likely typo for March 18, 2025 given 2024 financial statements.
Guaranty release possible if: guarantor sells all equity, replacement guarantor approved, franchisee in good standing with no default in prior 24 months.
Liquidated damages in FA may use 'Termination Fee' language with additional Guest Room count multiplier ($25,000 × rooms) for early termination in first 2 years.
